mapper.select:
SELECT ws.*, p.process_name as processName, w.name as workshopName FROM workstation ws JOIN process p ON p.id = ws.process_id JOIN workshop w ON w.id = ws.workshop_id
AND ws.code =#{code}
AND p.process_name like CONCAT('%', #{processName}, '%')
AND w.name like CONCAT('%', #{workshopName}, '%')
